What Qibla Finder CollectsQibla Finder collects the following data from User and Users use of the App and of the services available through the App (“Services”):We collect, process and use information that User provides or makes available to us when accessing or using our App and Services. Examples of such information include:

The information of User’s access or use of the App and/or Services such as User’s modifications to any of settings; dhikrs, prayer times, messages written on Message Editor (Solely, the written text inside the app) and Qur’an reading the page where the User is left off.We also receive, store and process information, including personal data, when User access or use the App, including but not limited to:

Device-specific information relating to User’s device, for example, device brand and model, operating system version, device language, unique device identifiers (such as IDFA), and mobile network information (such as mobile carrier);Geolocation information, including but not limited to IP addresses used to connect devices to the internet, GPS data and network services data, anonymously. Application-specific information relating to the App; like application version number, activity on the App and Subscription status.

1.8 Qibla Finder offers signup options which will be explained in detail at section 6. Users must be aware that only one Qibla Finder account could be logged in a single device at a time. Multiple login is not supported. User should logout from a device to login from another or previous session is terminated when User logins from a new device.

6.2 DELETION OF INFORMATIONRetention of collected data subjects to the Third Party companies limits, which are listed at 2.2. Of Qibla Finder or any other apps of Qibla FinderQibla Finder App does not save personal data which are listed at 2.2, in It’s server unless User creates an account as declared on 6.1.If User creates an account and prefers their account to be deleted, there are a few steps to complete the deletion:

User must go to settings, tap my profile screen and  tap to “delete account” at the footer. Then the account information from the Qibla Finder app’s Database will be deleted automatically. User will see “Account is successfully deleted” message after deletion is complete.It will take approximately 48 hours to apply the changes on the app. User can no longer login unless creating a new account.User needs to delete Social Login (Facebook or Google Login) app activities themself. Steps are mentioned below.

decoder_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Facebook Login

heading_content_part: User’s Account Information Deletion for Facebook LoginIf User wants to delete their activities on Qibla Finder of a Facebook account, Users have the choice to remove their information and delete their account by following these steps:Go to Facebook Account’s Setting & Privacy. Tap “Settings”Look for “Apps and Websites” and you will see all of the apps and websites you linked with your Facebook.Search and tap “Qibla Finder” in the search bar.Tap “Remove”.

decoder_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Facebook Login
ident_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Facebook Login
heading_content_part: App activities are successfully removed from Qibla Finder app.If Qibla Finder app could not be found at the search result mentioned on step 3,  which is “Apps and Websites” search, that means the Qibla Finder app activities are not stored in a Facebook account.

decoder_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Google Login
ident_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Google Login
heading_content_part: User’s Account Information Deletion for Google LoginIf User wants to delete their activities on Qibla Finder of a Google account, Users have the choice to remove their information and delete their account by following these steps:Go to Google Account settingsUnder “Services on this device” title, go to “Settings for Google Apps”Tap Connected AppsChoose Qibla Finder App among the listTap “Disconnect”App activities are successfully removed from Qibla Finder app.

decoder_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Google Login
ident_heading: User’s Account Information Deletion for Google Login
heading_content_part: If Qibla Finder app could not be found at the search result mentioned on step 4,  which is “Choose Qibla Finder App among the list” search, that means the Qibla Finder app activities are not stored in a Google account.Besides Facebook and Google, Users could request to delete the account information of their email account that have been created on Qibla Finder App, by contacting[email protected]email address.

14. SUBSCRIPTIONS14.1 Subscriptions start when the payment has been confirmed and will continue for that period (monthly, yearly or lifetime). Users might change the auto-renewal preferences from their store accounts (Google Play Store, Apple App Store or Huawei Mobile Services) or contact[email protected]

for the web payment option. All the responsibilities are owned by Users about the auto-renew subscriptions. Subscription pricing is subject to change. New pricing takes effect upon renewal of the existing subscription.Subscription will automatically renew at the end of the applicable subscription period unless the Users cancel their subscription before the end of the current subscription period.

Qibla Finder offers Trial version for a specified period without payment and requires Users’ payment details to start the Trial. After the Users agree that, Qibla Finder automatically begin charging for the subscription on the first day following the end of the trial. If the Users do not want this charge, they must cancel the applicable paid subscription before the end of the trial.

Qibla Finder may offer subscription packages to Users when they launch the app for the first time, or when Users are actively using the app. Subscription offers may be shown to Users in a full screen, as in-app-message or through a notification where Users have their own preference or consent, to reject or accept the offer. Qibla Finder and Qibla Finder apps are free to use. It is never obligatory to accept any subscription package offers, from any App Stores (Google Play Store, Apple App Store or Huawei Mobile Services) or web purchases.

Subscription packages include specific features not served to free Users. Subscription services and prices could be updated from time to time. At the moment, premium features are: no ads, widgets, dhikr button options, Qibla compass options, Several Qur’an themes, Some of the Islamic sticker packs.
